sys_script_include.description:
2.8 | 2022-08-01 | mmcc | DFCT0011122 - Page Task Requests needs to match the standard layout for flexing header-body-footer Add a bifold in loadRelatedLists: function(rlParms) after isModal: rlParms.isModal. update _getTabTitle() to check if plural exists use it else use label 2.8 | 2022-07-27 | raj | DFCT0011118 - "Respond to Org Hierarchy icon" is NOT displaying for OUHAs (except GHA) in the "Org Hierarchy Tree page" - the null issue fix from this story - STRY0120908 - removed an error in the log, but stopped the icon from being properly displayed.
2.8 | 2022-07-27 | raj | DFCT0010784 - "Sub OUs" and "Sub Tasks" should open in a MODAL in the "OU Request" bi-fold view 2.8 | 2022-07-24 | raj | DFCT0011062 - When viewing a task in the "Document Management" task form view the task does NOT display the tabs "My Attachments" and "Shared Attachments" 2.8 | 2022-07-17 | raj | STRY0120159 - Task Form- New Icons to Filter "This Task or All Descendants" 2.8 | 2022-06-09 | raj | STRY0120440 - Task Form- Add "Response Log" as a new tab 2.8 | 2022-05-16 | raj | STRY0122880 - Task Tree Widget- Update Messaging for "Wait state set with no Subtask" to include Draft Tasks 2.8 | 2022-05-16 | raj | STRY0120403 - Delegation Layout- Add buttons to filter "This Task" and "All Descendant Tasks" 2.8 | 2022-04-20 | raj | STRY0120908 - As any Tasker User, if "Org Hierarchy Fullscreen" is accessible from the "Layout Dropdown", I do NOT want it accessible anywhere else. had this story open and used it to fix a null value issue 2.8 | 2022-03-29 | raj | STRY0119587 - Task Form Page Layout- Layout: Requests - Initial Tasker Tabs widget 2.8 | 2022-03-24 | mmcc | STRY0115677 - Org Hierarchy Full Screen- Process Request Indicator- Popover Styling 2.8 | 2022-03-18 | raj | STRY0115436 -Organizational Hierarchy Fullscreen- Popover lists will in alphabetical order 2.8 | 2022-03-18 | raj | STRY0108687 -DIA - Organizational Hierarchy Visual Indicators- Define Popover Styling- Additional Styling Changes 2.8 | 2022-03-10 | mmcc | STRY0114453 - Org Hierarchy Full Screen- Tree Node- Avatar Control- Popover Panel 2.8 | 2022-03-09 | raj | STRY0114672 - Org Hierarchy Full Screen- Tree Node- Any Members List- Update to Popover Panel 2.8 | 2022-03-04 | mmcc | STRY0114453 - Org Hierarchy Full Screen- Tree Node- Avatar Control- Popover Panel 2.8 | 2022-02-11 - raj - STRY0114453 - Org Hierarchy Full Screen- Tree Node- Avatar Control- Popover Panel 2.7.3 | 2022-05-04 | raj | DFCT0010902 - When a template task record is updated the Template Task Number in the node text is set to null. This is cleared with the next refresh 2.7.2 | 2022-02-03 - raj - STRY0117609 - Stretch- "Delete" button should be available on the Portal for "Template Tasks" 2.7.2 | 2022-01-17 | raj | STRY0116812 TECH - Update Org Tree to handle record watcher the same way Task and Template do (no diagram redraw) 2.7.1 | 2021-12-05 | raj | DFCT0010684 Task Tree Nodes- "Add Subtask Icon" does not pick up Record Watcher
2.7 combined Template Widget Data into here, added convertHtmlToSimpleString; Update .href to use dot notation for state and order STRY0109208 , STRY0109209 - Add Create Icon STRY0110317 - DIA: Time in Task suspense date defaults to the time when creating the Templates. Adjust the default time to the end of the day for all new Templates. STRY0113084 - Templates- Duration Fields- Update Label and Info Text
2.6 Performance Updates - move Task Tree List load and configuration into a seperate file
sys_script_include.name: TaskWidgetData
